hero.title: Welcome to the Matrix
hero.subtitle: Enter the world of Apache Sling - where content meets code

text-block-1.title: What is Sling Matrix?
text-block-1.text:
Sling Matrix is your gateway to mastering Apache Sling. Like Neo awakening to the true nature of reality, you'll discover the power beneath the surface of web content management.

This documentation will guide you through the fundamental concepts of OSGi, JCR, and Sling - the three pillars that support the Matrix of modern content-driven applications.

text-block-2.title: Follow the White Rabbit
text-block-2.text:
Ready to see how deep the rabbit hole goes? Explore our documentation sections to unlock the secrets of Apache Sling:

  • OSGi - The modular foundation of the Matrix
  • JCR - The repository that stores all truth
  • Sling - The framework that brings it all together
